title: Minerals → Manufacturing
description: Iron ore & steel feed Automotive (KMC bus frames ~37,300 t); copper wiring harnesses feed KMC EVs; cobalt feeds EV batteries

title: Circular flows
description: Steel slag → cement (SCM); bagasse → grid power; sugar vinasse → bio-fertilizer; plastic waste → cement kilns (alt. fuel)

title: Petrochemicals unlock Plastics
description: Kabalega refinery (~2029) → domestic polymer resin → import substitution for USD 37m+ packaging imports

title: Green advantage
description: Uganda's hydro grid enables low-carbon steel (scrap-EAF), green ammonia fertiliser, and low-carbon EV buses — a genuine export differentiator
